snippets.snippet: Best beach for snorkeling, very friendly and helpful owner.
Saya senang dengan keramahan dan pelayanan di Rihlah Resort.
We practically had the entire beach to ourselves.
For everybody who wants to relax it’s the right place.

address.address1: Kilometer Nol  Street, Iboih Pulau Weh

favoriteFeatures.name: Airport transfer
favoriteFeatures.tooltip: Airport transfer available at additional charge. To request, check the box on the booking form just before the payment page.

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Sparkling clean
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Guests have rated this property 9.4/10 on cleanliness

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Top Value
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Guests rated this property 9.4/10 on value for money

usefulInfo.name: Breakfast charge (unless included in room price)

description.short: The car parking and the Wi-Fi are always free, so you can stay in touch and come and go as you please. Conveniently situated in the Sabang part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. As an added bonus, restaurant is provided on-site to conveniently serve your needs.

details.title: Infant 0-4 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 5-10 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 11 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

featureGroups.name: Things to do, ways to relax

reviewSnippets: We practically had the entire beach to ourselves.
Saya senang dengan keramahan dan pelayanan di Rihlah Resort.
Amazing place, amazing view, amazing service

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Perfect for those who don't like crowds. And of course, the food is really delicious. Even though it's far from the city, you're guaranteed not to go hungry because the cafe offers really good food 🫶🏻🫶🏻
comments.originalComment: Cocok buat kaum2 tidak suka keramaian. Dan pastinya makanannya enak bangetttt. Walaupun jauh dri kota dijamin gk bakalan lapar krn cafenya menyediakan makanan yang enakkk 🫶🏻🫶🏻

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Tenang, nyaman, damai.. anak2 bisa bermain di pantai dengan puas. untuk yg cari ketenangan sangat rekomen disini. ky tinggal di runah sendiri yg terhampar kebun yg bnyk daunnya  dan pinggir pantai. Ownernya baik, di carikan dolpin trip dengan harga yg relatif terjangkau.. tambahan dikasih bonus nasi goreng untuk anak2.. terimakasih, pengalaman yg menyenangkan saat di sabang.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Saya senang dengan keramahan dan pelayanan di Rihlah Resort. Pantai depan kamar menawarkan view yang diluar ekspektasi saya karena harga yang ditawarkan relatif murah ketika peak season.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responseText: terima kasih atas apresiasinya pak, semoga ada kesempatan untuk kembali ke Rihlah.
comments.reviewComments: Actually, one day of vacation is still not enough.
comments.originalComment: Sebenernya masih kurang banget cuma sehari di rihlah

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
The location is perfectly situated at the beach for a relaxing get away on a sleepy island. The owner, sutria, is very nice and speaks good English. The staff, especially Sutria, create a family like atmosphere by cooking together (with the guests) or just chatting while watching the sea.
Amazing resort!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responseText:
Terima kasih kembali kak atas apresiasinya. semoga ada kesempatan bisa berkunjung kembali ke Sabang dan menginap bersama kami.

Salam hormat kami.
comments.reviewComments:
Thank you for the service
Awesome

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responseText:
Dear Kak Fatin,
Thank you for your appreciation and it really means to us. We wish you all the best and hopefully we can provide you better service for your next visit to Pulau Web-sabang.

Thank you.
comments.reviewComments:
I was here for 4 nights and enjoyed every single night. 

The location is slightly far from the hustle and bustle of Iboih Beach but that made for a very quiet and private place. We practically had the entire beach to ourselves. 

The room was comfortable, with clean bathrooms. There is even a mini restaurant/cafe on the premises and the Ayam Tangkap (a specialty Aceh dish is highly recommended). They are also able to provide breakfast from outside vendors to be delivered to your room in the morning. 

Service was top notch. Satrya, the owner was able to arrange everything for us, including airport transfers, tours around the island as well as dolphin tours that picked us up right on the beach infront of our room. 

Highly recommended and will come back again.
comments.reviewTitle: Amazing place, amazing view, amazing service

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responseText:
Hi Kak Seeta,

Thank you for your appreciation to us and great suggestions, we really appreciate it. wish you all the best. 

thank you
comments.reviewComments: So far we have been staying over 5 places in sabang and this place beats every other our stays even the far pricier one, friendly owner and staff, very quiet side, not exactly at the heart of Iboih where are more things to do but its just 10mins away with bike, room is basic but works well, the only suggestion we give is better pillows type and more hooks in room to hang our stuff, other than that i hope they stay true and keep the authenticity

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responseText: Terima Kasih atas apresiasinya, semoga kami bisa terus menjadi lebih bark.
comments.reviewComments: Pemilik dan staff terbaik dgn pelayan yang ramah

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responseText:
we wish our guess to be more specific about what kind of uncomfortable things we have done. we think we already provide our guest with hospitality more than usual with low price hotel. we provide free drive for buying fruits and others for few days, free drive to city, which normally cost IDR 200k (return), till we gave free drive to seaport and full assist until you arrive at next hotel in Banda Aceh. we value our guest feed back, but not irrational message. 

regards,
comments.reviewComments: I advise you as your brother's friend. Such actions do not want to continue the resort as a guest. I think you need to know how important "beautiful light" is.
comments.originalComment:
I advise you as your brother friend. Such actions do not want to reserving the resort as a guest. I think you need to know how important "beautiful last" is.
----------------------------------------

Saya menyarankan Anda sebagai teman saudara Anda. Tindakan seperti itu tidak ingin melanjutkan resor sebagai tamu. Saya pikir Anda perlu tahu betapa pentingnya "terang yang indah".

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Permata tersembunyi di Iboih, fasilitas kamar terbaik dan kebersihan kamar, bed sheet terjaga baik dan kasur yang nyaman. 
5 star service with super friendly owner that work with heart.
Keep this good work Rihlah

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The place is super comfortable, the service is extraordinary, the food is really delicious.. The kids can play happily on the beach.. The view is, MasyaAllah, very beautiful..
comments.originalComment: Tempatnya super nyaman, pelayanannya luar biasa, makanannya enak banget.. Anak bisa bermain dengan puas di pantainya.. Pemandangan ya MasyaAllah indah sekali..

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Super endroit pour être au calme et profiter d'une jolie plage et d'un beau spot de snorkeling. Ambiance décontractée et service adorable de la part de notre hôte. Un endroit où on a envie de revenir

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Such a nice experience! Best beach for snorkeling, very friendly and helpful owner. Best cook, so delicious! We really enjoyed our time at Rihlah and can absolutely recommend it! Unforgettable time!
comments.reviewTitle: Best place to be in Pulau Weh

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Sehr empfehlenswert.
Einer der schönstens Strände auf der Insel

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
When we stayed at Rilah Resort it was really quite which we really enjoyed. The staff was super nice and helpful. The view is really nice and the beach right in front of the accommodation is tidy. For everybody who wants to relax it’s the right place. The owner was really helpful and super kind. The rooms were clean and spacious. 
Thanks for the stay.
comments.reviewTitle: Really nice place to relax and enjoy the Beach

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Stay only one night
Very very peaceful,relax ,enjoy our stay
We stay at sea view bungalow,
Best stay ever,value for yourmoney

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
The view is mesmerizing! 

I very love the view here. Love the location of the hotel facing the beach view. Love the privacy of the room facing the beach at night. I would like to say the owner and staff are so kind, friendly and helpful. 

This area is really recommended for snorkeling and dolphin tours. Here is the place to chill and relax and enjoy the mesmerizing view, especially during sunrise and sunset! The food is delicious and awesome. Breakfast/Dinner is good!  

We enjoy our staying here. The place to head to at Sabang. Perfect sea view (gorgeous color), sunrise views, and sounds of waves hitting the sand from the room, perfect!

Nice view, a nice place, and good food as well. Sleeping with the rhythm of waves is surely unforgettable. I will come back for sure.
